disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Researchers highlight hidden spread of Hantavirus in Pacific Northwest rodents - krem.com
updates.body_en: Researchers highlight hidden spread of Hantavirus in Pacific Northwest rodents krem.com
updates.summary_zh: 研究人员强调汉坦病毒在太平洋西北部啮齿动物中隐匿传播。

updates.title_en: Three linked to hantavirus outbreak remain in hospital in Victoria - Times Colonist
updates.body_en: Three linked to hantavirus outbreak remain in hospital in Victoria Times Colonist
updates.summary_zh: 维多利亚市三名汉坦病毒疫情相关者仍在住院。

updates.title_en: Americans exposed to hantavirus on ship enjoy some Nebraska hospitality while waiting in quarantine - Toronto Star
updates.body_en: Americans exposed to hantavirus on ship enjoy some Nebraska hospitality while waiting in quarantine Toronto Star
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮上接触汉坦病毒的美国人在内布拉斯加州隔离。

updates.title_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says - CBC
updates.body_en: No Ebola cases in Canada and no new hantavirus cases, chief public health officer says CBC Canada’s chief public health officer delivers updates on hantavirus, Ebola Radio-Canada Risk low, but Niagara officials keep watch as hantavirus cases reach Canada St. Catharines Standard
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大首席公共卫生官称无埃博拉及新增汉坦病例。

updates.title_en: Federal Update on Hantavirus and Ebola Outbreaks – May 22, 2026 - CPAC.ca
updates.body_en: Federal Update on Hantavirus and Ebola Outbreaks – May 22, 2026 CPAC.ca
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大联邦更新汉坦病毒和埃博拉疫情。

updates.title_en: Number of reported cases of hantavirus rises to 12, 3 reported deaths: WHO - Xinhua
updates.body_en: Number of reported cases of hantavirus rises to 12, 3 reported deaths: WHO Xinhua
updates.summary_zh: WHO 通报汉坦病毒病例增至12例，死亡3例。

updates.title_en: VIDEO: Study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some areas of PNW - KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.body_en: VIDEO: Study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some areas of PNW KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.summary_zh: 研究显示美国太平洋西北地区汉坦病毒高流行。

updates.body_en: WHO says 12th person infected with hantavirus detected in the Netherlands Al Jazeera
updates.summary_zh: WHO 通报荷兰第12例汉坦病毒感染者。

updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Final 14 days of home quarantine for negative cases Euronews
updates.summary_zh: 阴性病例需居家隔离14天。

updates.body_en: Dutch cruise ship crew member tests positive for Hantavirus in isolation The Telegraph

updates.body_en: Person negative for Ebola in Ontario after testing out of ‘abundance of caution’ CityNews Toronto

updates.body_en: Hantavirus cases linked to cruise ship rise to 12 after crew member tests positive NBC News
